message:
franken_numpy-conf: add linalg conformance tests for cholesky/slogdet/eigvals/matrix_power/pinv

Expand the linalg differential conformance suite with 5 new oracle-verified
test cases covering:
- cholesky_2x2: Cholesky decomposition of positive-definite matrix
- slogdet_2x2: Sign and log-absolute-determinant
- eigvals_2x2: Eigenvalue computation for symmetric matrix
- matrix_power: Matrix exponentiation (A^n)
- pinv_2x2: Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse

Also adds operation handlers in execute_linalg_operation for these 5 operations
with corresponding validation in validate_linalg_differential_expectation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
